scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:js
scripts.test:fast: npm run lint && python -m pytest tests/python/ -m "not live" && python scripts/check_coverage.py --min 85
scripts.verify:fast: npm run lint && python -m pytest tests/python/ -m "not live" && python scripts/check_coverage.py --min 85
scripts.verify: npm run verify:fast && npm run verify:live && npm run verify:playwright && python scripts/verify_summary.py
